title: MagicClass
description: Adds a range of magical items which make you a Wizard!
body:
# MagicClass Assets Resource Pack is required

# Info:

MagicClass is a Minecraft datapack which adds many new magical weapons and unique items to the game. 

It adds a Mana system, when an item is used, it costs Mana. When you successfully cast a spell, you gain SkillXP. Your Skill Level contributes to the maximum amount of Mana you can have.

Included items (as of Beta 1.0):
- MagicClass Info Book
- Staff of Regeneration
- Poison Ivy
- Fire Ray Staff
- Hex Staff
- Mana Berry

### Showcase Video: [https://youtu.be/pbDaLro8VAk](https://youtu.be/pbDaLro8VAk)

## How to install:

If you are adding this into a pre-existing world:

Unzip the file
- Place into a minecraft save e.g. C:\users\Optim00se\AppData\Roaming\.minecraft\saves\world\datapacks\
- If the datapack does not show any message upon loading the world, try /reload
- If you are creating a new world:

Unzip the file
- In the Create New World menu, click More
- Click the Data Packs button, go to Open Pack Folder
- Navigate to the unzipped folder that has RecipeBuff
- Select it to be used for world creation.
- If the datapack does not show any message upon loading the world, try /reload

**Any issues? My discord username is @optim00se. Ping me!**
